weekly_summary: Over the past 24 hours, our security landscape has been characterized by a total of 3 findings, tracking 4 unique CVEs, with each of CVE-2026-1376, CVE-2026-32838, CVE-2026-32839, and CVE-2026-1267 being observed once. The primary areas of activity have been focused on Containers and Kubernetes, as well as Operating System and Kernel domains. Notably, the majority of activity was concentrated on March 18, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security events, highlighting the need for continued vigilance and monitoring of these critical infrastructure components.
